hooks.command:
echo '{"systemMessage": "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
REPO: amm-toolkit (PUBLIC KNOWLEDGE HUB)
DEPLOYS TO: amm.labs.searchatlas.com
HARBOR IMAGE: dashboards/amm-sa-dashboard
ARGOCD APP: dash-amm-sa-dashboard

NOT for: AMM Internal Dashboard (amm-dashboard.labs.searchatlas.com)
THAT lives in: search-atlas-group/product-managers/dashboards/amm-sa-dashboard
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━"}'

PROMPT=$(jq -r '.user_prompt // ""'); if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qiE 'dashboard\.labs|internal.dashboard|amm-sa-dashboard repo|amm-dashboard repo|internal.*deploy|deploy.*internal|dashboard.*deploy'; then echo '{"systemMessage": "REPO BOUNDARY WARNING: You may be describing work for the AMM Internal Dashboard, which lives in a separate repo (product-managers/dashboards/amm-sa-dashboard). This repo (amm-toolkit) only deploys to amm.labs.searchatlas.com."}'; else echo '{}'; fi
